description_long: This is a two-story residential house with a modern, minimalist design, featuring a prominent gable roof in dark gray. The front facade includes a covered porch with two tall, narrow shrubs flanking the entryway, and a driveway leading up to the house with a parked car. The exterior walls are clad in light-colored siding, and the windows are arranged in a simple, functional pattern, with larger windows on the ground floor and smaller ones above. The property is landscaped with several deciduous trees and a paved walkway. The rear of the house is more utilitarian, with fewer windows and a plain wall. The overall setting suggests a suburban or urban neighborhood environment.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark gable roof, light siding, covered porch, and landscaped yard with trees and driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, covered porch, driveway with car, and landscaping with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, driveway, and two tall shrubs near the entry.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with minimal windows and the driveway extending from the house.
description_view_3: Back and side view showing the rear facade, additional windows, and surrounding trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered porch with steps, flanked by tall shrubs, and a simple single door under a roof overhang.
